title: lapsana communis subsp. intermedia
intro: Lapsana communis subsp. intermedia, also known as the looseleaf navelwort or prickly navelwort, is a subspecies of perennial plant in the family Asteraceae. It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Lapsana communis subsp. intermedia include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat various ailments, particularly those related to the digestive and respiratory systems.
